title: Taira Clan Saga
writer: Masashige Narusawa, Hisakazu Tsuji, Yoshikata Yoda
actors: Narutoshi Hayashi, Raizô Ichikawa, Tatsuya Ishiguro
plot: After his father is not rewarded for his military achievements, Taira Kiyomori rebels against the court and the monks who rule the country. He also falls in love with Tokiko and discovers unsettling revelations about his parentage.
